mnemonics: Evaluating Expressions: Evaluate from Left to Right
Querying Textbooks: Q for Query, E for Evaluate
keyPoints: pandas.eval() applies to Series and DataFrames
pandas.eval() supports various data types including strings and numbers
pandas.eval() can handle basic math operations like addition, subtraction, multiplication, division
pandas.eval() can also handle string operations like concatenation, split, and join
pandas.eval() can work with time series data using datetime-related libraries
pandas.eval() is useful for conditional statements like if-else and for loops
query method is used for filtering data in DataFrames
